fields.name: request
fields.comment: The supplier onboarding request (contains supplier, documents, expected volume)

fields.name: supplierId
fields.comment: ID of the supplier — mapped from extractDocuments tool param

fields.name: documentContext
fields.comment: Assembled document metadata for AI extraction, then extraction summary for policy validation

fields.name: processingStep
fields.comment: Current AgentProcessingStep being built during tool execution

fields.name: supplierContext
fields.comment: JSON of the supplier object, built internally from in.request.getSupplier()

fields.name: policyRules
fields.comment: Policy rules loaded for the per-rule validation loop

fields.name: ruleIndex
fields.comment: Current index in the policy rule loop

fields.name: ruleContext
fields.comment: Built context for the current rule (matching doc content + supplier context)

fields.name: ruleDocumentFound
fields.comment: True if the current rule's required document is present in the extraction result (or the rule has no document type)

fields.name: ruleSystemPrompt
fields.comment: Per-rule system prompt for the AI call

fields.name: ruleFindings
fields.comment: Scratch: AI findings for the current rule iteration

fields.name: accumulatedFindings
fields.comment: Running list of findings accumulated across all rule iterations

fields.name: existingFindings
fields.comment: Existing findings from prior run (from onboardingRequest.policyValidationFindings), null on first run

fields.name: filteredExistingFindings
fields.comment: Subset of existingFindings kept for re-use: all findings except resolved MISSING_DOC ones

fields.name: ruleAlreadyEvaluated
fields.comment: True when the current rule already has a finding in filteredExistingFindings; AI call is skipped

fields.name: onboardingRequest
fields.comment: Full OnboardingRequest passed into validateAgainstPolicy; used to read/write policyValidationFindings

fields.name: policySystemPrompt
fields.comment: Composed system prompt for policy validation (rules injected into CMS template)

fields.name: policyRuleEvaluations
fields.comment: Per-rule evaluation list with isPassed and risk score context for the current supplier

fields.name: policyComplianceScore
fields.comment: Deterministic policy compliance score computed from rule violations

fields.name: policyValidationResult
fields.comment: Output of validateAgainstPolicy tool: findings plus AgentProcessingStep

fields.name: extractionResult
fields.comment: Full extraction result from extractDocuments — stored for policy validation context and returned as callable output

fields.name: extractionSummary
fields.comment: Plain-text summary of extracted documents returned to the LLM from extractDocuments

fields.name: findingsSummary
fields.comment: Plain-text summary of policy findings returned to the LLM from validateAgainstPolicy

fields.name: validationSummary
fields.comment: Overall validation summary text produced by the outer LLM agent

fields.name: error
fields.comment: Caught BpmError from ErrorBoundaryEvent

fields.name: crossReferenceResult
fields.comment: Output: cross-reference check findings plus AgentProcessingStep (set as side effect by tool)

fields.name: annualVolumeEur
fields.comment: Expected annual procurement volume in EUR

fields.name: riskScoreResult
fields.comment: Output: 4-component risk score, routing decision, and AgentProcessingStep

fields.name: riskScoringSystemPrompt
fields.comment: Composed system prompt for AI risk scoring (policy rules injected)

fields.name: agentResponse
fields.comment: Agent response with matched suppliers, isSupplierExisting, matchScore and feedback

fields.name: criteria
fields.comment: Search criteria shared by findDuplicateSuppliers and findExactSupplier tools

fields.name: toolResponse
fields.comment: Tool result for findDuplicateSuppliers

fields.name: documents
fields.comment: Full list of legal documents loaded once before the per-document extraction loop

fields.name: requiredDocuments
fields.comment: Labels of required documents from both CertificationType and LegalDocumentType, used in policy validation prompt

fields.name: documentPresenceFindings
fields.comment: Pre-created ValidationFindings from Java presence check (PASSED/FAILURE per required doc type), merged into policyValidationResult after AI run

fields.name: documentIndex
fields.comment: Current loop index for the per-document extraction loop (0-based)

fields.name: singleExtraction
fields.comment: Scratch field: AI extraction result for the current single document in the loop

fields.name: result
fields.comment: Tool result for findExactSupplier

fields.name: financialValidationResult
fields.comment: Output of validateFinancialPolicy tool: financial rule findings plus AgentProcessingStep

fields.name: financialStabilityScore
fields.comment: Deterministic financial stability score computed from financial rule violations

fields.name: caseUuid
fields.comment: Case UUID used to load repository data
